preview.title: Scan Results
preview.photoDenied: Photo access not granted — only app cache was scanned. Enable it in Settings.
preview.junk.note: Selected by default. Apps rebuild caches as needed — your data is never touched.
preview.deepHint: Go Pro to enable Deep Scan for similar burst photos
preview.recoverNote: Deleted photos go to Recently Deleted and can be restored for 30 days
result.title: All Clean
result.recover: Deleted by mistake? Restore from Photos → Recently Deleted
paywall.title: PureClean Pro
paywall.batch: Batch clean: select all redundant photos at once
paywall.deep: Deep scan: detect similar bursts and near-duplicates
paywall.auto: Auto clean: scan automatically on launch
paywall.loadFailed: Couldn't load the price. Check your connection and retry.
paywall.pending: Purchase awaiting approval. Pro unlocks automatically once approved.
paywall.failed.title: Purchase Incomplete
paywall.terms: Auto-renewing subscription. Cancel anytime in App Store settings. No charge if cancelled before the trial ends.
settings.title: Settings
restore.failed: Restore failed. Check your connection and retry.
settings.privacy.body: PureClean never uploads anything: scanning and cleaning run 100% on-device — no servers, no ads, no push, no analytics SDKs, zero-collection privacy manifest. The only optional network action: while previewing, you can manually load that one photo from your own iCloud (download only, never upload).
result.photoFailed: Photos were not deleted: permission may be missing, or you tapped Don't Allow in the system dialog. Check Settings → Privacy & Security → Photos and try again.
preview.icloudSkipped: %d photos live only in iCloud and were skipped (on-device mode never downloads)
preview.showingFirst: Showing first %d items — scan again after cleaning to handle the rest
preview.hint: Tap to select · Long-press to preview
viewer.loadFailed: Load failed. Check your connection and retry.
confirm.title: Confirm Cleanup?
confirm.message: %d selected items will be deleted, freeing about %@. Photos go to Recently Deleted and can be restored for 30 days.
